variants.title: Donaldson P766673 Hydraulic Housing
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P766673 Hydraulic Housing provides a durable and reliable enclosure for hydraulic filters, ensuring secure placement and optimal fluid flow within hydraulic systems. Its precision-engineered design supports efficient filtration and helps maintain system cleanliness. Constructed from high-strength materials, this hydraulic housing offers excellent resistance to pressure and wear. It is compatible with various filter types and is designed for easy maintenance and filter replacement.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Housing, Outer Diameter: 90.0 mm, Length: 213.0 mm
